name: Vintage Plastic Easter Basket Teal - Spritz™
description:
Brighten up your Easter celebrations with this Vintage Plastic Easter Basket Teal - Spritz™. Crafted from durable polyethylene, it features a round shape and a generous size, perfect for holding treats or decorative items. Its vibrant teal green color adds a cheerful touch to your holiday decor. With a height of 6.5 inches and a 12-inch width and depth, it's both practical and stylish for your seasonal needs.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
